title: 'Everything here will burn': Raging wildfire wreaks havoc in France's Drôme mountains
subhed: Hundreds of firefighters and military personnel have faced a vast wildfire sweeping through more than 3,500 hectares of this rugged region north of Provence – leading three villages, two campsites and 450 children at summer camp to be evacuated.

Strait of Hormuz deadlock could lead Trump into sporadic war with Iran
subhed: The renewed US and Iranian strikes on Wednesday, despite the memorandum of understanding reached between the two countries, jeopardize hopes for a swift end to the crisis unpopular with the American public.

title: 'In trying to avoid accusations of exaggerating, the IPCC has instead underestimated the severity of our summers'
subhed: Long accused of alarmism by the far right, the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) has, in fact, been too cautious, underestimating the speed of change and its impacts, says historian Jean-Baptiste Fressoz.

title: Kanye West, banned from most European countries, receives €4 million grant to perform in Albania
subhed: Barred from entering or performing due to antisemitic and neo-Nazi statements, the American rapper is set to take the stage on July 11 in Tirana. Many protesters are accusing Prime Minister Edi Rama of using the event to serve his own interests.

title: British Museum director on Bayeux Tapestry loan: 'A gesture of confidence, friendship and, above all, trust'
subhed: France has just delivered the Bayeux Tapestry to the United Kingdom, where it will remain on display until 2027. The unprecedented gesture crowns 1,000 years of shared history, writes Nicholas Cullinan, director of the British Museum.

subhed: The annexed Ukrainian peninsula, which Vladimir Putin sees as his crowning jewel, has descended into chaos as Kyiv ramps up attacks on the territory. Shocked tourists and residents express their distress as shortages worsen.

title: After a year eyeing France's presidency, Bardella has to settle for deputy
subhed: On Marine Le Pen's first campaign trip after being cleared to run for president despite her conviction, her would-be stand-in Jordan Bardella looked stern at her side.

title: EWC 2026 in Paris: Behind the scenes of the controversial partnership between France and Saudi Arabia in esports
subhed: By hosting this Saudi video game tournament in Paris, with an opening ceremony on Wednesday, July 8, featuring a concert by Aya Nakamura, the Elysée is endorsing the kingdom's dominance in the sector – but not without facing criticism from the French esports community.
